title: Desktop App Feature Parity & IPC Bugfix — Phase 1 Execution
consumer_purpose: Fix the blocking installCli IPC orphaned handler bug and deliver Phase 1 quick-win features from the desktop app audit: session search, keyboard shortcut hints, MCP browser improvements, agent configuration UI, context display, and settings polish.
claim_atoms: installCli IPC handler implemented — renderer no longer hangs
Blocking bug fix eliminates orphaned IPC channel
Phase 1 quick wins deliver measurable UX improvements
All existing dirty files preserved intact
content:
# Desktop App Feature Parity & IPC Bugfix — Phase 1 Execution Plan

## Boundary
`desktop-feature-parity-phase1` — fix blocking IPC bug + deliver Phase 1 quick wins

## Consumer Purpose
Desktop app users: the Install CLI menu item works without hanging. Phase 1 features (session search, keyboard hints, MCP browser, agent config, context display, settings polish) close the most impactful gaps between TUI CLI and desktop app.

---

## SLICE 1 — BLOCKING BUG FIX (MANDATORY, DO FIRST)

### Task 1.1: Implement installCli IPC Handler
**Files**: `packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts`, `packages/desktop/src/main/install-cli.ts` (new)

**What**: Add `ipcMain.handle("install-cli", ...)` that:
1. Determines the current app binary path (packaged: `app.getPath("exe")`, dev: resolved from project)
2. Creates a symlink or copies the `opencode` CLI to `~/.local/bin/opencode` (Unix) or `%USERPROFILE%\.opencode\bin\opencode.exe` (Windows)
3. Returns the installed path as a `Promise<string>`

**Implementation notes**:
- For **packaged apps**: the `opencode` CLI is bundled in `process.resourcesPath` as `opencode-server` or can be resolved from the sidecar path
- For **development**: resolve from the monorepo build output (`packages/opencode/dist/`)
- Create target bin directory if it doesn't exist using `mkdir -p` / `fs.mkdirSync` recursive
- Use `fs.symlinkSync` on Unix, `fs.copyFileSync` on Windows (requires admin for symlinks)
- Handle errors gracefully — if symlink fails, fall back to copy
- **Dirty file preservation**: ipc.ts already has prior agent edits for lazy IPC handlers. The edit must be additive: add the new handler alongside existing ones, not restructure the file.

**Verification**: `window.api.installCli()` returns a string path without hanging.

---

## SLICE 2 — SESSION SEARCH UI

### Task 2.1: Add Full-Text Session Search
**Files**: `packages/app/src/` (search UI component), `packages/desktop/src/renderer/` (integration point)

**What**: Add a search bar to the session list panel that:
- Searches across session titles and message content
- Filters sessions in real-time as user types
- Shows matching session count
- Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+F / Ctrl+F) to focus search

**Approach**: Search is client-side against loaded session metadata. For deeper full-text, use the sidecar API endpoint for session search.

---

## SLICE 3 — KEYBOARD SHORTCUT DISCOVERABILITY

### Task 3.1: Shortcut Hints Overlay
**Files**: `packages/app/src/` (new shortcut hints component)

**What**: When user holds modifier key (Cmd/Ctrl), show an overlay with available keyboard shortcuts:
- Parse existing shortcut registrations
- Display in a compact, themed overlay
- Dismiss on modifier release or click outside

---

## SLICE 4 — MCP BROWSER IMPROVEMENTS

### Task 4.1: Enhanced MCP Server Management UI
**Files**: `packages/app/src/` (MCP management components)

**What**: Enhance the existing dialog-select-mcp to:
- Show server health/status indicators
- Allow adding/removing MCP servers
- Display tool counts per server
- Configuration editor for server settings

---

## SLICE 5 — AGENT CONFIGURATION UI

### Task 5.1: Agent Create/Edit UI
**Files**: `packages/app/src/` (agent config dialog)

**What**: Add UI to create and edit custom agents:
- Agent name, system prompt, model selection, provider config
- Reuse existing settings dialogs patterns
- Save to sidecar agent configuration

---

## SLICE 6 — CONTEXT DISPLAY

### Task 6.1: Context Pressure Indicator
**Files**: `packages/app/src/` (session context display)

**What**: Show current context window usage in the session UI:
- Display percentage of context used
- Warning at 80%+ utilization
- Indicator when context compaction occurs

---

## SLICE 7 — SETTINGS POLISH

### Task 7.1: Settings UI Improvements
**Files**: `packages/desktop/src/renderer/` (settings components)

**What**: Polish existing settings dialogs:
- Reorganize settings categories
- Add search/filter to settings
- Improve keyboard navigation
- Fix any visual inconsistencies

---

## Dirty File Preservation
All pre-existing modifications to the following files must be preserved exactly:
- `packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts` — has lazy IPC handler edits from prior sessions
- `packages/desktop/src/main/index.ts` — has runtime performance edits (port discovery, IPC split, async CA certs)
- `packages/desktop/src/main/sidecar.ts` — has port discovery edits
- `packages/desktop/src/main/server.ts` — has sidecar ready message edits
- `packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts` — has previous agent additions

Edits to these files must be **additive only**: add new handlers/functions alongside existing ones. Never restructure or reformat.

## Test Plan
1. TypeScript typecheck: `cd packages/desktop && bun run typecheck`
2. Verify IPC handler registration: no orphaned channels
3. Build desktop: `cd packages/desktop && bun run build`
